hero.title: Hurghada-Born. Results-Driven. Since 2015.
hero.subtitle: We started MediaBubble in Hurghada because we saw local businesses being underserved by generic agencies that didn't understand the market. Ten years later, we're a team of 22+ and the region's most trusted marketing partner.
hero.proof3: Clients in tourism, hospitality, retail, and real estate

story.heading: Our Story
story.body: MediaBubble started in Hurghada in 2015 with one goal: give Red Sea businesses marketing quality on par with Cairo and Dubai, without agency overhead. Today we work with hotels, restaurants, real estate, healthcare, and retail across Egypt and the Gulf.
story.body2: We stay small on purpose. Every client gets a dedicated team, direct access to decision-makers, and reporting you can act on.

values.heading: What Drives Us
values.title: The Principles Behind Every Campaign
values.subtitle: We've refined our approach over ten years of working with businesses in Hurghada and across Egypt. These three principles drive every decision we make.

results.title: Results First
results.desc: Every campaign starts with a specific, measurable target agreed in writing before we spend a pound. If we are off-track at week six, you hear it from us first, not from a dashboard.

partnership.title: A Dedicated Team, Not a Ticketing System
partnership.desc: Every client has a named account manager reachable by phone during working hours. We attend your launches, respond same-day, and flag problems before you notice them.

reporting.title: Radical Transparency
reporting.desc: You get a live performance dashboard from day one, a plain-English monthly report, and direct read-access to your ad accounts. No locked logins. No mystery numbers.

creative.name: Creative
creative.def: Work that earns attention because it is clear, on-brand, and built to convert.

strategic.name: Strategic
strategic.def: Every decision ties to a goal. We align creative, copy, and media to what you need to achieve.

dataDriven.name: Data-Driven
dataDriven.def: We set targets before we spend. Campaigns tie to revenue, leads, or bookings you can track.

team.heading: The Team Behind Your Growth
team.subheading: 22+ specialists across strategy, design, development, and media.

hero.title: SEO, web, ads, and content from one Hurghada team
hero.subtitle: Pick a channel or bundle them. One plan, one report, no handoffs between vendors.

cta.heading: Need help choosing a service?
cta.body: Book a 30-minute call. We listen to your goal and point you to the right channel and next steps.

heading.title: Four steps from brief to results
heading.subtitle: Discovery, strategy, build, and launch. Each step has a clear deliverable and owner.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.description: We audit your market, competitors, and current marketing. You get a written brief with priorities and quick wins.

step2.title: Strategy
step2.description: We define goals, channels, budget, and KPIs. You approve the plan before we build anything.

step3.title: Build
step3.description: Design, content, ads, and development run in parallel with weekly check-ins and shared timelines.

step4.title: Launch and grow
step4.description: We go live, track performance, and optimize monthly. You get reports you can use in board meetings.

footer.tagline: Ready to start? Book your free strategy audit.

heading.title: Recent client results
heading.subtitle: Six Hurghada businesses. Real metrics from live campaigns.

project1.description: SEO and paid search for a 4-star hotel chain. Direct bookings up 68% in six months.

project2.description: Local SEO and content marketing. Organic traffic up 340% in eight months.

project3.description: Brand refresh and new website. Lead volume doubled in the first quarter.

project4.description: From sporadic posts to a consistent content calendar that built community and drove room enquiries.

project5.description: A 48-hour property launch with precision Meta targeting and a purpose-built landing page.
project5.metric: 300 qualified leads and 4.2× ROAS in 48 hours

project6.description: Full Next.js rebuild with structured data and Core Web Vitals optimisation.
project6.metric: 94 Lighthouse score and 42% more organic conversions
